fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Image to display alongside the newsletter sign-up. Leave empty to omit.

fields.name: image-alt
fields.label: Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessible alt text for the image.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Content
fields.description: Heading, sub-heading or body copy shown above the sign-up form.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.label: Input Placeholder
fields.description: Placeholder text inside the email input.

fields.name: toast-content
fields.label: Toast Message
fields.description: Message shown in the success toast after form submission.

fields.name: background-color
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: CSS colour value (e.g. #f3f4f6 or var(--color-gray)). Leave empty to use the default.

fields.name: use-image-as-background
fields.label: Use Image as Background
fields.description: When enabled, the image fills the block background instead of appearing in a side panel.
